metadata.description: Security controls per layer with implementation status

principles: PII never reaches the model — extracted as transient technical parameter only
Authorization delegated to ma-hr-orch — agent has no RBAC

layers.description: API MARH integration and request validation

controls.name: IAM Authentication
controls.description: InvokeFunction via AWS SDK with IAM role (preferred) or Function URL with AWS_IAM + SigV4
controls.implementation: Lambda resource policy restricting to API MARH role ARN. No shared secret.

controls.name: JSON Schema Validation (Layer 1)
controls.description: Validate request payload against defined schema before processing
controls.implementation: jsonschema library in Lambda; reject malformed requests with ERR-001

controls.name: Company Context Validation
controls.description: Validate presence and format of company_id — not authorization
controls.implementation: Check company_id present and non-empty. If absent → ERR-001.
controls.note: Authorization (token, interlocutor, FNP, prova de vida) is ma-hr-orch's responsibility

layers.description: Company immutability — ma-hr-orch handles real authorization

controls.name: Company Lock
controls.description: company_id from trusted context — cannot be changed by chat
controls.implementation: Agent uses company_id from payload, not from user message text

controls.name: No Agent RBAC
controls.description: Agent does not implement role-based access. Removed: admin/rh/colaborador roles.
controls.implementation: No permission matrix in agent. Delegate all authorization to ma-hr-orch.
controls.note: Roles admin/rh/colaborador removed from architecture (RN-004, SEG-001)

controls.name: No Company Elevation via Chat
controls.description: User cannot switch company by typing CNPJ or contract in chat
controls.implementation: Classifier detects company substitution attempts and returns policy response

controls.name: Secrets Manager
controls.description: Store secrets (ma-hr-orch token if needed) in AWS Secrets Manager
controls.implementation: boto3 secretsmanager client; cache in Lambda memory during lifecycle

controls.name: KMS Encryption
controls.description: CMK for S3 documents and Secrets Manager envelope encryption
controls.implementation: 2 CMKs: alias/marh-agent-s3, alias/marh-agent-secrets

controls.name: IAM Least Privilege
controls.description: Lambda role with minimum required permissions. Model ARN uses confirmed model ID.
controls.implementation: Explicit allow for bedrock:InvokeModel (confirmed model ARN), s3:GetObject, s3vectors:QueryVectors, secretsmanager:GetSecretValue, kms:Decrypt, logs:*, xray:*
controls.note: Replace MODEL_ID_CONFIRMED with validated model ID before deploy

controls.name: No Hardcoded Secrets
controls.description: No secrets in code, environment variables, or logs
controls.implementation: Code review checklist; Secrets Manager only

controls.name: Layer 1 — Schema Validation
controls.description: Validate structure and types of API request and response
controls.implementation: jsonschema validation on input payload and API response

controls.name: Layer 2 — Allowlist of Real Fields
controls.description: Only real inventoried fields from ma-hr-orch responses pass through
controls.implementation: Allowlist dictionary per endpoint — derived from api_capability_map.json

controls.name: Layer 3 — Complementary Sanitization
controls.description: Pattern-based removal of PII that escaped allowlist
controls.implementation: Regex patterns for CPF, email, phone — complement to allowlist, not replacement
controls.note: Allowlist is primary control. Regex is defense-in-depth complement.

controls.name: Layer 4 — Output Validation
controls.description: Final validation of response before returning to user
controls.implementation: PII re-scan on output; size check; no LLM re-call

controls.name: CPF as Transient Technical Parameter
controls.description: CPF extracted from user message used as API parameter only — never in LLM context
controls.implementation: Extract CPF → pass as nameOrCpf parameter → discard after API call. Never log. Never pass to model.

layers.description: LLM security — only called in RAG_ONLY flow

controls.name: Anti-Prompt Injection
controls.description: System prompt with identity anchor. Applies only to RAG_ONLY flow.
controls.implementation: Fixed system prompt; separation of system/user roles; anti-manipulation instructions

controls.name: Output Validation (Re-scan)
controls.description: Re-scan LLM output for PII before returning. Applies only to RAG_ONLY.
controls.implementation: Same patterns as Layer 3

controls.name: GET-Only Tool Use
controls.description: Only GET operations allowed — no write/delete/update
controls.implementation: Hardcoded HTTP method; no PUT/POST/DELETE/PATCH allowed

controls.name: Endpoint Allowlist
controls.description: Only pre-defined ma-hr-orch endpoints can be called
controls.implementation: Hardcoded list of allowed endpoints; reject any dynamic URL

layers.description: Network security and encryption in transit

controls.name: HTTPS Everywhere
controls.description: All communications use HTTPS (TLS 1.2+)
controls.implementation: AWS SDK defaults to HTTPS; httpx client with verify=True

controls.name: No VPC (POC)
controls.description: Lambda outside VPC; uses HTTPS regional endpoints
controls.implementation: Default Lambda configuration
controls.production_change: Consider VPC if ma-hr-orch migrates to private network or compliance requires

controls.name: No PII in Logs
controls.description: Sanitize all log entries before writing to CloudWatch
controls.implementation: Log sanitizer function; never log raw user messages or API responses

controls.name: Security Event Logging
controls.description: Log security-relevant events without PII
controls.implementation: Structured JSON logs with event types — intent, flow, error code

removed_controls.name: Role-Based Access (admin/rh/colaborador)
removed_controls.reason: Removed — agent does not implement RBAC. Roles admin/rh/colaborador were invented without client source. Authorization is ma-hr-orch's responsibility (RN-004, SEG-001).

removed_controls.name: In-memory rate limiting as global security control
removed_controls.reason: Removed — Lambda memory is not shared between instances. Cannot be a reliable global rate limiter. Throttling is API MARH's responsibility.
